_patch_meta.description: Verse context classification — batch VCB-031, Registry 213 (listen), 36 terms, 748 verses. Includes vertical_pass_flag and set_aside_reason fields (new schema additions — apply schema update before patch). Groups revised to characteristic-perspective model per session methodology note.

required_before_apply: ALTER TABLE verse_context_group ADD COLUMN vertical_pass_flag INTEGER DEFAULT 0;
ALTER TABLE verse_context ADD COLUMN vertical_pass_flag INTEGER DEFAULT 0;
ALTER TABLE verse_context ADD COLUMN set_aside_reason TEXT DEFAULT NULL;
_schema_note.rationale: New fields added in VCB-031 session. vertical_pass_flag tracks whether a verse_context_group or verse_context record has been through vertical pass analysis. set_aside_reason provides controlled vocabulary for why a verse was set aside, enabling rediscovery of potentially misclassified verses under revised analytical models.
